'''Gates Harnik''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] grocer supplying the local [[Cilpari Resistance|resistance]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Cilpar]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].

==Biography==
When [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Boren Tascl]] destroyed the [[City/Legends|town]] of [[Tamarack]], they captured Harnik and [[Death/Legends|hung]] him from the ruins of the city. His brief [[Funeral/Legends|funeral]] was presided over by [[Cilpari Resistance]] leader [[Elscol Loro]], and his body was [[Cremation/Legends|cremated]] by fellow resistance member [[Chang]].
